question_text: Let D = {x(1), . . . , x(n)} be a dataset of n observations where each x(i) ∈R100. It is given that i=1 x(i) = 0. The covariance matrix computed from D has eigenvalues λi = 1002−i, 1 ≤i ≤100. Let u ∈R100 be the direction of maximum variance with u⊤u = 1. The value of i=1 �u⊤x(i)2 = (
